UNKNOWN_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again shortly.
NETWORK_ERROR: Unable to reach the server. Check your network connection.
BATCH_NOT_FOUND: The batch could not be found.
BATCH_NOT_EDITABLE: This batch can no longer be edited in its current state.
BATCH_NOT_SYNCED: Only completed batches can resync prompts.
BATCH_EMPTY: Add at least one prompt before submitting the batch.
PROMPT_NOT_FOUND: The prompt could not be found.
BATCH_RESULT_NOT_FOUND: The batch result could not be found yet.
UNSUPPORTED_MODEL: The selected model is not supported.
EXTERNAL_API_ERROR: An error occurred while calling the external AI service.
INVALID_REQUEST: The request is invalid. Please review the entered values.
